claims.text: We claim: 1. An oral dosage form comprising: (a) an effective amount of an alkalizing agent; and (b) multiparticulates wherein said multiparticulates comprise (i) about 20% to about 75% azithromycin, ...

16. A method for reducing the frequency of gastrointestinal side effects, associated with administering azithromycin to a mammal, comprising contiguously administering oral dosage form of claim 1 to s...

33. A method of treating a bacterial or protozoal infection in a mammal in need thereof comprising administering to said mammal a single dose of an oral dosage form of claim 1 .
33. A method of treating a bacterial or protozoal infection in a mammal in need thereof comprising administering to said mammal a single dose of an oral dosage form of claim 1 .
33. A method of treating a bacterial or protozoal infection in a mammal in need thereof comprising administering to said mammal a single dose of an oral dosage form of claim 1 .

indications.text:
Zmax is indicated for the treatment with mild to moderate infections caused by susceptible isolates of
the designated microorganisms in the specific conditions listed below. [See CLINICAL STUDIES
(14)]
Acute bacterial sinusitis in adults due to Haemophilus influenzae, Moraxella catarrhalis or
Strept...
